Theorem a1i 11
Description: Inference introducing an antecedent. Inference associated with ax-1 6. Its associated inference is a1ii 2. See conventions 30488 for a definition of "associated inference". (Contributed by NM, 29-Dec-1992.)
Hypothesis
Ref Expression
a1i.1 ⊢ 𝜑
Assertion
Ref Expression
a1i ⊢ (𝜓 → 𝜑)
Proof of Theorem a1i
StepHypRef Expression
1 a1i.1 . 2 ⊢ 𝜑
2 ax-1 6 . 2 ⊢ (𝜑 → (𝜓 → 𝜑))
31, 2ax-mp 5 1 ⊢ (𝜓 → 𝜑)
Colors of variables: wff setvar class
Syntax hints:   → wi 4
This theorem was proved from axioms:  ax-mp 5  ax-1 6
